identity.title: Identity & CE
identity.subtitle: Product identification, CE marking, the public simplified Declaration of Conformity, and the buyer-facing end-user information.

identity.heading: Product identification
identity.description: The type, batch and serial that uniquely identify the product (CRA Art 13(15)–(16)).
identity.notifiedBodyCertificatePlaceholder: Certificate no., if a notified body was involved
identity.notifiedBodyCertificateNote: Only for products whose conformity route required a notified body.
identity.manufacturerNote: Drawn from your organisation entity — edit it in Settings → Entity.

ce.heading: CE marking
ce.description: Record where and when the CE marking is affixed (Art 30).
ce.locations: Where the CE marking is affixed
ce.notesPlaceholder: Any detail about how the marking is applied…

help.title: CE marking
help.body: The CE marking is affixed visibly, legibly and indelibly to the product before it is placed on the market; where that is not possible it goes on the packaging and in the accompanying documents. It signifies conformity with the CRA (and any other applicable Union legislation).
help.ref: CRA Article 30 + Regulation (EC) No 765/2008 — general principles of the CE marking.

simplified.heading: Simplified Declaration of Conformity (Annex VI)
simplified.description: Publish a short-form DoC at a public URL — the address you can print on the product or packaging so anyone can reach the declaration.
simplified.needsPublicPages: Enable public pages for your organisation (Settings → set a public slug + turn on the public security page) to publish a simplified DoC.
simplified.notPublished: Not published. Publish to expose the public URL.

help.title: Simplified DoC
help.body: Annex VI lets you provide a simplified declaration of conformity — the product, the manufacturer, and a statement that the full EU declaration of conformity is available at a given internet address. This is the page that address points to.
help.ref: CRA Annex VI — simplified EU declaration of conformity.

annexII.heading: End-user information (Annex II)
annexII.description: The buyer-facing cybersecurity information sheet that must accompany the product — covering Annex II items 1–9.
annexII.knownRisksPlaceholder: Risks a user should be aware of and how to mitigate them (Annex II item 5)…
annexII.supportEndUnset: Set the support period on the product overview.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

public.title: Declaration of Conformity
public.statement: {manufacturer} declares under its sole responsibility that the product “{product}” is in conformity with Regulation (EU) 2024/2847 (the Cyber Resilience Act) and the other Union legislation applicable to it.
public.fullDocNote: The full EU Declaration of Conformity and the technical documentation are available from the manufacturer on request at the contact above.
public.footer: Published via Seentrix · CRA Annex VI simplified declaration of conformity.
